---
title: "CoLab score: Discordant predictions related to bias in ED population with low COVID-19 prevalence"
output: html_document
date: "Report generated on: `r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
set.seed(seed = 200)
```

## Import functions and variables.
```{r, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
source('src/variables_colab.R', local = variables <- new.env())
source('src/predict_colab.R', local = colab <- new.env())
```

## Set simulation parameters.
```{r}
parameters <- new.env()
parameters$data <- read.csv('data/colab_ed_low_prevalence.csv')
parameters$identifier <- "visit_id"
parameters$continuous_prediction_function <- colab$get_continuous_prediction_colab
parameters$ordinal_prediction_function <- colab$get_ordinal_prediction_colab
parameters$categorical_prediction_function <- colab$get_categorical_prediction_colab
parameters$model <- NA
parameters$model_variables <- variables$selected_variables_colab
parameters$uncertain_variables <- variables$selected_variables_colab[variables$uncertain_variables_indicator_colab]
```

## Set bias data parameters.
```{r}
parameters$bias_data <- read.csv('data/paba_data.csv')
parameters$bias_data_lab_col <- "ptp"
parameters$bias_data_cluster_col <- "ctr"
parameters$bias_data_measurement_col <- "Bepaling"
parameters$bias_data_names <- c(
  "Erytrocyten_BV" =  "Erytrocyten",
  "Leukocyten_BV" = "Leukocyten",
  "BilirubineTotaal_BV" = "Bilirubine",
  "LD_BV" = "LD",
  "AlkFosf_BV" = "Alk. Fosfatase",
  "Albumine_BV" = "Albumine" ,
  "GGT_BV" = "Gamma-GT",
  "CRP_BV" = "CRP"
)
parameters$bias_data_reference_lab <- 11
```

## Set bootstrap parameters for results of individual laboratories.
```{r}
parameters$bootstrap_number_of_samples <- NA
parameters$bootstrap_confidence_level <- NA
parameters$bootstrap_methods <- NA # choose from c("perc¨, "norm", "bca")
```

## Set plot parameters.
```{r}
parameters$histogram_continuous_median_prediction_binwidth <- 0.1
parameters$histogram_continuous_median_prediction_x_range <- c(-6, -4)
parameters$histogram_continuous_median_prediction_y_range <- c(0, 20)
parameters$histogram_continuous_median_difference_binwidth <- 0.1
parameters$histogram_continuous_median_difference_x_range <- c(-1, 1)
parameters$histogram_continuous_median_difference_y_range <- c(0, 20)
parameters$histogram_continuous_median_percentage_difference_binwidth <- 1
parameters$histogram_continuous_median_percentage_difference_x_range <- c(-5, 20)
parameters$histogram_continuous_median_percentage_difference_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_continuous_mae_binwidth <- 0.05
parameters$histogram_continuous_mae_x_range <- c(0, 1)
parameters$histogram_continuous_mae_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_continuous_rmse_binwidth <- 0.05
parameters$histogram_continuous_rmse_x_range <- c(0, 1)
parameters$histogram_continuous_rmse_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_continuous_mape_trimmed_binwidth <- 1
parameters$histogram_continuous_mape_trimmed_x_range <- c(0, 20)
parameters$histogram_continuous_mape_trimmed_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_continuous_mdape_binwidth <- 1
parameters$histogram_continuous_mdape_x_range <- c(0, 20)
parameters$histogram_continuous_mdape_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_continuous_rmspe_trimmed_binwidth <- 1
parameters$histogram_continuous_rmspe_trimmed_x_range <- c(0, 20)
parameters$histogram_continuous_rmspe_trimmed_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_continuous_rmdspe_binwidth <- 1
parameters$histogram_continuous_rmdspe_x_range <- c(0, 20)
parameters$histogram_continuous_rmdspe_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_median_difference_binwidth <- 0.05
parameters$histogram_ordinal_median_difference_x_range <- c(0, 1)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_median_difference_y_range <- c(0, 50)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_mae_binwidth <- 0.05
parameters$histogram_ordinal_mae_x_range <- c(0, 1)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_mae_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_micro_rmse_binwidth <- 0.05
parameters$histogram_ordinal_micro_rmse_x_range <- c(0, 1)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_micro_rmse_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_macro_rmse_binwidth <- 0.05
parameters$histogram_ordinal_macro_rmse_x_range <- c(0, 1)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_macro_rmse_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_percentage_discordant_binwidth <- 2
parameters$histogram_ordinal_percentage_discordant_x_range <- c(0, 50)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_percentage_discordant_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_categorical_percentage_discordant_binwidth <- 0.2
parameters$histogram_categorical_percentage_discordant_x_range <- c(0, 5)
parameters$histogram_categorical_percentage_discordant_y_range <- c(0, 10)
```

## Set parameters to save results.
```{r}
parameters$model_name <- 'colab'
parameters$population <- 'ed_low'
parameters$path_output <- 'out/colab/simulations_discordance/'
```

```{r, child='markdown/template_discordance.Rmd'}

```
